name: Adelle Corp
declaringWar: You stand in the way of my people. Let us solve this like warriors!
attacked: You dare have the courage to challenge nod, but no fear, for I will sweep you out of history.
defeated: You have the guts to call my body a corpse but beware, I know what will happen to our future- our tiberium future.
introduction: If I am cut, Do I not bleed?
tradeRequest: I am not always this generous, but we hope you take this rare opportunity we give you.

name: The New Movement
declaringWar: It is in  my Intentions to spread the word of Nod into your land.
attacked: Pitiful fool! Now we shall destroy you!
defeated: I see for the black hand has been unworthy to serve Kane.
introduction: If you would stay out of our way then you might live to tell your tale.
tradeRequest: I would be grateful if you agreed on the following proposal.
uniques: No damage penalty for wounded units <for [non-air] units>

name: Giannic Alliance
declaringWar: Our paitience for you has run out, Goodbye.
attacked: We can't tell if your simply stupid or unrelentingly retarded. Either way we shall put you out of your missery
introduction: We are the sons and daughters of Gia. Humans, Machines, and Uplifted alike.
tradeRequest: We offer you trade, and our terms are good.

name: Iota Persei
declaringWar: We will tollerate you no more.
defeated: We may be gone but your fate won't be better
introduction: Greetings starnger? Have you traveled amongst the starts to trade?
tradeRequest: Heres an offer, do you accept?

name: Crime Lords of Bazzik
attacked: We see you seek death. Don't worry you won't be long for this world.
defeated: Even if you take us out crime will never go.
introduction: If you need anything Illegal done we are who you call.
tradeRequest: Here's an offer you better accept.

name: Teal Empire
defeated: Once comes one goes we reaped what we sowed. Now what remaines to be seen is what will be reaped from you?
introduction: Greetings odd one, Are you Freind, Subject or Foe?
uniques: [1] Happiness from each type of luxury resource
[+33]% Production when constructing [Light cruiser] units [in capital]

name: Human Empire
startIntroPart1: You are playing as the Human Empire! A faction with a long hystory going all the way back to Earth itself as the first Humans of the Human Empire were some of those who fled the home system during the earlier phases of the second great solar system war. They were mostly scientists and their famililes with a couple engeniers here and there aswell, Yet Unfortunatly they this small population of scientitists soon found themselves in one of the most hostile and competative corners of the known universe.
startIntroPart2: Thus to survive they became the Human Empire their sociotity was forced to militerise up leading to many growing pains yet ensuring their surviveal in such a hostile region of space. Despite this under all their militerisim their old habbits such as a strong desire to explore the stars have never died down but rather had risen from the ashes leading to a odd combination of scicne and warfare.
declaringWar: We'll cut straight to the chase. We don't like you, and we intend to take action regarding that.
attacked: We warrned you not to take our kindess for weakness. Now it is time you regret making this fatal mistake.
defeated: Do you think you have won? Today perhaps but your tomorrow looks bleak
introduction: Hello stranger! We come in peace, but should you mistake our kindess for weakness you will find out we can also come in war.
tradeRequest: Heres an offer that may profit us both.
uniques: [+1 Science] from [Barren Planet] tiles [in all cities]
[+1 Science] from [Desert Planet] tiles [in all cities]
[+1 Science] from [Lush Planet] tiles [in all cities]
[-75]% Gold cost of acquiring tiles [in all cities]

name: Orgol
declaringWar: You leave us no choice. We must wage war against you.
attacked: Very well, this shall be your end.
defeated: Our time has come, you are next

name: Orgellin
declaringWar: You leave us little choice. We must wage war against you.
defeated: Our time has come, you will be next
uniques: [+100]% Production when constructing [Warship] units [in capital] <when at war>
